139→                val iterator = modifierList.children().iterator()
140→                var currentNode: ASTNode
141→                while (iterator.hasNext()) {
142→                    currentNode = iterator.next()
143→                    if (currentNode.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
144→                        currentNode.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY &&
145→                        currentNode.elementType != WHITE_SPACE
146→                    ) {
147→                        return currentNode
148→                    }
149→                }
150→                return modifierList.nextCodeSibling()
151→            }
152→        return funNode.nextCodeLeaf()
153→    }
154→
155→    private fun visitFunctionSignature(
156→        node: ASTNode,
157→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
158→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
159→    ) {
160→        require(node.elementType == FUN)
161→
162→        val forceMultilineSignature =
163→            node.hasMinimumNumberOfParameters() ||
164→                node.containsMultilineParameter() ||
165→                (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.containsAnnotatedParameter())
166→        if (isMaxLineLengthSet()) {
167→            val singleLineFunctionSignatureLength = calculateFunctionSignatureLengthAsSingleLineSignature(node, emit, autoCorrect)
168→            // Function signatures not having parameters, should not be reformatted automatically. It would result in function signatures
169→            // like below, which are not acceptable:
170→            //     fun aVeryLongFunctionName(
171→            //     ) = "some-value"
172→            //
173→            //     fun aVeryLongFunctionName(
174→            //     ): SomeVeryLongTypeName =
175→            //         SomeVeryLongTypeName(...)
176→            // Leave it up to the max-line-length rule to detect those violations so that the developer can handle it manually.
177→            val rewriteFunctionSignatureWithParameters = node.countParameters() > 0 && singleLineFunctionSignatureLength > maxLineLength
178→            if (forceMultilineSignature || rewriteFunctionSignatureWithParameters) {
179→                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = true, dryRun = false)
180→                // Due to rewriting the function signature, the remaining length on the last line of the multiline
181→                // signature needs to be recalculated
182→                val lengthOfLastLine = recalculateRemainLengthForFirstLineOfBodyExpression(node)
183→                fixFunctionBody(node, emit, autoCorrect, maxLineLength - lengthOfLastLine)
184→            } else {
185→                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = false)
186→                fixFunctionBody(node, emit, autoCorrect, maxLineLength - singleLineFunctionSignatureLength)
187→            }
188→        } else {
189→            // When max line length is not set then keep it as single line function signature only when the original
190→            // signature already was a single line signature. Otherwise, rewrite the entire signature as a multiline
191→            // signature.
192→            val rewriteToSingleLineFunctionSignature =
193→                node
194→                    .functionSignatureNodes()
195→                    .none { it.textContains('\n') }
196→            if (!forceMultilineSignature && rewriteToSingleLineFunctionSignature) {
197→                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = false)
198→            } else {
199→                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = true, dryRun = false)
200→            }
201→        }
202→    }
203→
204→    private fun recalculateRemainLengthForFirstLineOfBodyExpression(node: ASTNode): Int {
205→        val closingParenthesis =
206→            node
207→                .findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
208→                ?.findChildByType(RPAR)
209→        val tailNodesOfFunctionSignature =
210→            node
211→                .functionSignatureNodes()
212→                .childrenBetween(
213→                    startASTNodePredicate = { it == closingParenthesis },
214→                    endASTNodePredicate = { false },
215→                )
216→
217→        return node.indent(false).length +
218→            tailNodesOfFunctionSignature.sumOf { it.text.length }
219→    }
220→
221→    private fun ASTNode.containsMultilineParameter(): Boolean =
222→        findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
223→            ?.children()
224→            .orEmpty()
225→            .filter { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
226→            .any { it.textContains('\n') }
227→
228→    private fun ASTNode.containsAnnotatedParameter(): Boolean =
229→        findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
230→            ?.children()
231→            .orEmpty()
232→            .filter { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
233→            .any { it.isAnnotated() }
234→
235→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotated() =
236→        findChildByType(MODIFIER_LIST)
237→            ?.children()
238→            .orEmpty()
239→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
240→
241→    private fun calculateFunctionSignatureLengthAsSingleLineSignature(
242→        node: ASTNode,
243→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
244→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
245→    ): Int {
246→        val actualFunctionSignatureLength = node.getFunctionSignatureLength()
247→
248→        // Calculate the length of the function signature in case it would be rewritten as single line (and without a
249→        // maximum line length). The white space correction will be calculated via a dry run of the actual fix.
250→        return actualFunctionSignatureLength +
251→            // Calculate the white space correction in case the signature would be rewritten to a single line
252→            fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = true)
253→    }
254→
255→    private fun ASTNode.getFunctionSignatureLength() = indent(false).length + getFunctionSignatureNodesLength()
256→
257→    private fun ASTNode.getFunctionSignatureNodesLength() =
258→        functionSignatureNodes()
259→            .joinTextToString()
260→            .length
261→
262→    private fun fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(
263→        node: ASTNode,
264→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
265→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
266→        multiline: Boolean,
267→        dryRun: Boolean,
268→    ): Int {
269→        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
270→
271→        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
272→        val firstParameterInList =
273→            valueParameterList
274→                .children()
275→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
276→
277→        whiteSpaceCorrection +=
278→            if (firstParameterInList == null) {
279→                // handle empty parameter list
280→                fixWhiteSpacesInEmptyValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, dryRun)
281→            } else {
282→                fixWhiteSpacesBeforeFirstParameterInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun) +
283→                    fixWhiteSpacesBetweenParametersInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun) +
284→                    fixWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun)
285→            }
286→
287→        return whiteSpaceCorrection
288→    }
289→
290→    private fun fixWhiteSpacesInEmptyValueParameterList(
291→        node: ASTNode,
292→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
293→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
294→        dryRun: Boolean,
295→    ): Int {
296→        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
297→
298→        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
299→
300→        valueParameterList
301→            .children()
302→            .filter { it.elementType != LPAR && it.elementType != RPAR }
303→            .also { elementsInValueParameterList ->
304→                // Functions with comments in the value parameter list are excluded from processing before. So an "empty" value
305→                // parameter list should only contain a single whitespace element
306→                require(elementsInValueParameterList.count() <= 1)
307→            }
308→            .firstOrNull()
309→            ?.let { whiteSpace ->
310→                if (!dryRun) {
311→                    emit(
312→                        whiteSpace.startOffset,
313→                        "No whitespace expected in empty parameter list",
314→                        true,
315→                    )
316→                }
317→                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
318→                    whiteSpace.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpace)
319→                } else {
320→                    whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpace.textLength
321→                }
322→            }
323→
324→        return whiteSpaceCorrection
325→    }
326→
327→    private fun fixWhiteSpacesBeforeFirstParameterInValueParameterList(
328→        node: ASTNode,
329→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
330→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
331→        multiline: Boolean,
332→        dryRun: Boolean,
333→    ): Int {
334→        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
335→
336→        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
337→        val firstParameterInList =
338→            valueParameterList
339→                .children()
340→                .first { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
341→
342→        val firstParameter = firstParameterInList.firstChildNode
343→        firstParameter
344→            ?.prevLeaf()
345→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
346→            .let { whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier ->
347→                if (multiline) {
348→                    val expectedParameterIndent = node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)
349→                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
350→                        whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != expectedParameterIndent
351→                    ) {
352→                        if (!dryRun) {
353→                            emit(
354→                                firstParameterInList.startOffset,
355→                                "Newline expected after opening parenthesis",
356→                                true,
357→                            )
358→                        }
359→                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
360→                            valueParameterList.firstChildNode.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(expectedParameterIndent)
361→                        } else {
362→                            whiteSpaceCorrection += expectedParameterIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
363→                        }
364→                    }
365→                } else {
366→                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier != null) {
367→                        if (!dryRun) {
368→                            emit(
369→                                firstParameter!!.startOffset,
370→                                "No whitespace expected between opening parenthesis and first parameter name",
371→                                true,
372→                            )
373→                        }
374→                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
375→                            whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier)
376→                        } else {
377→                            whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.textLength
378→                        }
379→                    }
380→                }
381→            }
382→
383→        return whiteSpaceCorrection
384→    }
385→
386→    private fun fixWhiteSpacesBetweenParametersInValueParameterList(
387→        node: ASTNode,
388→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
389→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
390→        multiline: Boolean,
391→        dryRun: Boolean,
392→    ): Int {
393→        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
394→
395→        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
396→        val firstParameterInList =
397→            valueParameterList
398→                .children()
399→                .first { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
400→
401→        valueParameterList
402→            .children()
403→            .filter { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
404→            .filter { it != firstParameterInList }
405→            .forEach { valueParameter ->
406→                val firstChildNodeInValueParameter = valueParameter.firstChildNode
407→                firstChildNodeInValueParameter
408→                    ?.prevLeaf()
409→                    ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
410→                    .let { whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier ->
411→                        if (multiline) {
412→                            val expectedParameterIndent = node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)
413→                            if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
414→                                whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != expectedParameterIndent
415→                            ) {
416→                                if (!dryRun) {
417→                                    emit(
418→                                        valueParameter.startOffset,
419→                                        "Parameter should start on a newline",
420→                                        true,
421→                                    )
422→                                }
423→                                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
424→                                    firstChildNodeInValueParameter.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedParameterIndent)
425→                                } else {
426→                                    whiteSpaceCorrection += expectedParameterIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
427→                                }
428→                            }
429→                        } else {
430→                            if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null || whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != " ") {
431→                                if (!dryRun) {
432→                                    emit(
433→                                        firstChildNodeInValueParameter!!.startOffset,
434→                                        "Single whitespace expected before parameter",
435→                                        true,
436→                                    )
437→                                }
438→                                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
439→                                    firstChildNodeInValueParameter.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
440→                                } else {
441→                                    whiteSpaceCorrection += 1 - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
442→                                }
443→                            }
444→                        }
445→                    }
446→            }
447→
448→        return whiteSpaceCorrection
449→    }
450→
451→    private fun fixWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis(
452→        node: ASTNode,
453→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
454→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
455→        multiline: Boolean,
456→        dryRun: Boolean,
457→    ): Int {
458→        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
459→
460→        val newlineAndIndent = node.indent()
461→        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
462→
463→        val closingParenthesis = valueParameterList.findChildByType(RPAR)
464→        closingParenthesis
465→            ?.prevSibling()
466→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
467→            .let { whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis ->
468→                if (multiline) {
469→                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis == null ||
470→                        whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.text != newlineAndIndent
471→                    ) {
472→                        if (!dryRun) {
473→                            emit(
474→                                closingParenthesis!!.startOffset,
475→                                "Newline expected before closing parenthesis",
476→                                true,
477→                            )
478→                        }
479→                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
480→                            closingParenthesis!!.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(newlineAndIndent)
481→                        } else {
482→                            whiteSpaceCorrection += newlineAndIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis?.textLength ?: 0)
483→                        }
484→                    }
485→                } else {
486→                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis != null &&
487→                        whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.nextLeaf()?.elementType == RPAR
488→                    ) {
489→                        if (!dryRun) {
490→                            emit(
491→                                whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.startOffset,
492→                                "No whitespace expected between last parameter and closing parenthesis",
493→                                true,
494→                            )
495→                        }
496→                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
497→                            whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis)
498→                        } else {
499→                            whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.textLength
500→                        }
501→                    }
502→                }
503→            }
504→        return whiteSpaceCorrection
505→    }
506→
507→    private fun fixFunctionBody(
508→        node: ASTNode,
509→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
510→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
511→        maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression: Int,
512→    ) {
513→        if (node.findChildByType(EQ) == null) {
514→            fixFunctionBodyBlock(node, emit, autoCorrect)
515→        } else {
516→            fixFunctionBodyExpression(node, emit, autoCorrect, maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression)
517→        }
518→    }
519→
520→    private fun fixFunctionBodyExpression(
521→        node: ASTNode,
522→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
523→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
524→        maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression: Int,
525→    ) {
526→        val lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression =
527→            node
528→                .findChildByType(EQ)
529→                ?.nextLeaf(includeEmpty = true)
530→                ?: return
531→        val bodyNodes = node.getFunctionBody(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression)
532→        val whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression = bodyNodes.getStartingWhitespaceOrNull()
533→        val functionBodyExpressionNodes = bodyNodes.dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
534→
535→        val functionBodyExpressionLines =
536→            functionBodyExpressionNodes
537→                .joinTextToString()
538→                .split("\n")
539→        functionBodyExpressionLines
540→            .firstOrNull()
541→            ?.also { firstLineOfBodyExpression ->
542→                if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
543→                    val mergeWithFunctionSignature =
544→                        if (firstLineOfBodyExpression.length < maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression) {
545→                            functionBodyExpressionWrapping == default ||
546→                                (functionBodyExpressionWrapping == multiline && functionBodyExpressionLines.size == 1) ||
547→                                node.isMultilineFunctionSignatureWithoutExplicitReturnType(
548→                                    lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression,
549→                                )
550→                        } else {
551→                            false
552→                        }
553→                    if (mergeWithFunctionSignature) {
554→                        emit(
555→                            whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression!!.startOffset,
556→                            "First line of body expression fits on same line as function signature",
557→                            true,
558→                        )
559→                        if (autoCorrect) {
560→                            (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
561→                        }
562→                    }
563→                } else if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression == null ||
564→                    !whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression.textContains('\n')
565→                ) {
566→                    if (node.isMultilineFunctionSignatureWithoutExplicitReturnType(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression) &&
567→                        firstLineOfBodyExpression.length + 1 <= maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression
568→                    ) {
569→                        if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression == null ||
570→                            whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression.text != " "
571→                        ) {
572→                            emit(
573→                                functionBodyExpressionNodes.first().startOffset,
574→                                "Single whitespace expected before expression body",
575→                                true,
576→                            )
577→                            if (autoCorrect) {
578→                                functionBodyExpressionNodes
579→                                    .first()
580→                                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
581→                            }
582→                        }
583→                    } else if (firstLineOfBodyExpression.length + 1 > maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression ||
584→                        (functionBodyExpressionWrapping == multiline && functionBodyExpressionLines.size > 1) ||
585→                        functionBodyExpressionWrapping == always
586→                    ) {
587→                        emit(
588→                            functionBodyExpressionNodes.first().startOffset,
589→                            "Newline expected before expression body",
590→                            true,
591→                        )
592→                        if (autoCorrect) {
593→                            functionBodyExpressionNodes
594→                                .first()
595→                                .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent))
596→                        }
597→                    }
598→                }
599→            }
600→    }
601→
602→    private fun ASTNode.isMultilineFunctionSignatureWithoutExplicitReturnType(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression: ASTNode?) =
603→        functionSignatureNodes()
604→            .childrenBetween(
605→                startASTNodePredicate = { true },
606→                endASTNodePredicate = { it == lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression },
607→            ).joinToString(separator = "") { it.text }
608→            .split("\n")
609→            .lastOrNull()
610→            ?.matches(INDENT_WITH_CLOSING_PARENTHESIS)
611→            ?: false
612→
613→    private fun fixFunctionBodyBlock(
614→        node: ASTNode,
615→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
616→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
617→    ) {
618→        val lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBlockBody =
619→            node
620→                .getLastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBlockBody()
621→                ?.nextLeaf(includeEmpty = true)
622→                ?: return
623→
624→        val bodyNodes = node.getFunctionBody(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBlockBody)
625→        val whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression = bodyNodes.getStartingWhitespaceOrNull()
626→        val functionBodyBlock = bodyNodes.dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
627→
628→        functionBodyBlock
629→            .joinTextToString()
630→            .split("\n")
631→            .firstOrNull()
632→            ?.also {
633→                if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression?.text != " ") {
634→                    emit(functionBodyBlock.first().startOffset, "Expected a single space before body block", true)
635→                    if (autoCorrect) {
636→                        functionBodyBlock
637→                            .first()
638→                            .prevLeaf(true)
639→                            ?.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(" ")
640→                    }
641→                }
642→            }
643→    }
644→
645→    private fun ASTNode.getFunctionBody(splitNode: ASTNode?): List<ASTNode> =
646→        this
647→            .collectLeavesRecursively()
648→            .childrenBetween(
649→                startASTNodePredicate = { it == splitNode },
650→                endASTNodePredicate = {
651→                    // collect all remaining nodes
652→                    false
653→                },
654→            )
655→
656→    private fun List<ASTNode>.getStartingWhitespaceOrNull() =
657→        this
658→            .firstOrNull()
659→            ?.takeIf { first -> first.isWhiteSpace() }
660→
661→    private fun isMaxLineLengthSet() = maxLineLength != MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY_OFF
662→
663→    private fun List<ASTNode>.collectLeavesRecursively(): List<ASTNode> = flatMap { it.collectLeavesRecursively() }
664→
665→    private fun ASTNode.collectLeavesRecursively(): List<ASTNode> =
666→        if (psi is LeafElement) {
667→            listOf(this)
668→        } else {
669→            children()
670→                .flatMap { it.collectLeavesRecursively() }
671→                .toList()
672→        }
673→
674→    private fun List<ASTNode>.childrenBetween(
675→        startASTNodePredicate: (ASTNode) -> Boolean = { _ -> true },
676→        endASTNodePredicate: (ASTNode) -> Boolean = { _ -> false },
677→    ): List<ASTNode> {
678→        val iterator = iterator()
679→        var currentNode: ASTNode
680→        val childrenBetween: MutableList<ASTNode> = mutableListOf()
681→
682→        while (iterator.hasNext()) {
683→            currentNode = iterator.next()
684→            if (startASTNodePredicate(currentNode)) {
685→                childrenBetween.add(currentNode)
686→                break
687→            }
688→        }
689→
690→        while (iterator.hasNext()) {
691→            currentNode = iterator.next()
692→            childrenBetween.add(currentNode)
693→            if (endASTNodePredicate(currentNode)) {
694→                break
695→            }
696→        }
697→
698→        return childrenBetween
699→    }
700→
701→    private fun List<ASTNode>.joinTextToString(block: (ASTNode) -> String = { it.text }): String =
702→        collectLeavesRecursively().joinToString(separator = "") { block(it) }
703→
704→    private fun ASTNode.hasMinimumNumberOfParameters(): Boolean = countParameters() >= functionSignatureWrappingMinimumParameters
705→
706→    private fun ASTNode.countParameters(): Int {
707→        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
708→        return valueParameterList
709→            .children()
710→            .count { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
711→    }
712→
713→    private fun ASTNode.getLastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBlockBody(): ASTNode? =
714→        this
715→            .findChildByType(BLOCK)
716→            ?.firstChildNode
717→            ?.prevCodeLeaf()
718→
719→    public companion object {
720→        private const val FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY_UNSET = Int.MAX_VALUE
721→        public val FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY: EditorConfigProperty<Int> =
722→            EditorConfigProperty(
723→                type =
724→                    PropertyType.LowerCasingPropertyType(
725→                        "ktlint_function_signature_rule_force_multiline_when_parameter_count_greater_or_equal_than",
726→                        "Force wrapping the parameters of the function signature in case it contains at least the specified " +
727→                            "number of parameters even in case the entire function signature would fit on a single line. " +
728→                            "By default this parameter is not enabled.",
729→                        PropertyType.PropertyValueParser.POSITIVE_INT_VALUE_PARSER,
730→                        setOf("1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "unset"),
731→                    ),
732→                defaultValue = FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY_UNSET,
733→                ktlintOfficialCodeStyleDefaultValue = 2,
734→                propertyMapper = { property, _ ->
735→                    if (property?.isUnset == true) {
736→                        FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY_UNSET
737→                    } else {
738→                        property?.getValueAs<Int>()
739→                    }
740→                },
741→                propertyWriter = { property ->
742→                    if (property == FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY_UNSET) {
743→                        "unset"
744→                    } else {
745→                        property.toString()
746→                    }
747→                },
748→            )
749→
750→        public val FUNCTION_BODY_EXPRESSION_WRAPPING_PROPERTY: EditorConfigProperty<FunctionBodyExpressionWrapping> =
751→            EditorConfigProperty(
752→                type =
753→                    PropertyType.LowerCasingPropertyType(
754→                        "ktlint_function_signature_body_expression_wrapping",
755→                        "Determines how to wrap the body of function in case it is an expression. Use 'default' " +
756→                            "to wrap the body expression only when the first line of the expression does not fit on the same " +
757→                            "line as the function signature. Use 'multiline' to force wrapping of body expressions that " +
758→                            "consists of multiple line. Use 'always' to force wrapping of body expression always.",
759→                        EnumValueParser(FunctionBodyExpressionWrapping::class.java),
760→                        FunctionBodyExpressionWrapping.values().map { it.name }.toSet(),
761→                    ),

772→    @Suppress("EnumEntryName")
773→    public enum class FunctionBodyExpressionWrapping {
774→        /**
775→         * Keep the first line of the body expression on the same line as the function signature if max line length is
776→         * not exceeded.

779→
780→        /**

 44→/**
 45→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 46→ *
 47→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 48→ *
 49→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 50→ *
 51→ *    ```
 52→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 53→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 54→ *    ```
 55→ *
 56→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 57→ *
 58→ *    ```
 59→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 60→ *    var x: String
 61→ *    ```
 62→ *
 63→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 64→ *
 65→ *    ```
 66→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 67→ *    ```
 68→ *
 69→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 70→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 71→ *
 72→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 73→ */
 74→public class AnnotationRule :
 75→    StandardRule(
 76→        id = "annotation",
 77→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 78→            setOf(
 79→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 80→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 81→            ),
 82→        visitorModifiers =
 83→            setOf(
 84→                RunAfterRule(
 85→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 86→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 87→                ),
 88→            ),
 89→    ) {
 90→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 91→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 92→
 93→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 94→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 95→        indentConfig =
 96→            IndentConfig(
 97→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 98→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 99→            )
100→    }
101→
102→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
103→        node: ASTNode,
104→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
105→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
106→    ) {
107→        when (node.elementType) {
108→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
109→                visitAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
110→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
111→            }
112→            ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION, MODIFIER_LIST -> {
113→                visitAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
114→            }
115→            ANNOTATION -> {
116→                // Annotation array
117→                //     @[...]
118→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
119→            }
120→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
121→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
122→            }
123→            TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST -> {
124→                visitTypeArgumentList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
125→            }
126→        }
127→    }
128→
129→    private fun visitAnnotationList(
130→        node: ASTNode,
131→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
132→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
133→    ) {
134→        require(node.elementType in ANNOTATION_CONTAINER)
135→
136→        if (node.shouldWrapAnnotations()) {
137→            val expectedIndent =
138→                when {
139→                    node.elementType == ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION ->
140→                        node.treeParent.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)
141→                    node.hasAnnotationBeforeConstructor() ->
142→                        node.treeParent.treeParent.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)
143→                    else ->
144→                        node.treeParent.indent()
145→                }
146→
147→            node
148→                .children()
149→                .filter { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
150→                .filter {
151→                    it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() ||
152→                        !it.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryWithoutParametersOnTheSameLine()
153→                }.forEach { annotationEntry ->
154→                    annotationEntry
155→                        .prevLeaf()
156→                        ?.let { prevLeaf ->
157→                            // Let the indentation rule determine the exact indentation and only report and fix when the line needs to be
158→                            // wrapped
159→                            if (!prevLeaf.textContains('\n')) {
160→                                emit(prevLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before annotation", true)
161→                                if (autoCorrect) {
162→                                    prevLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
163→                                        prevLeaf
164→                                            .text
165→                                            .substringBeforeLast('\n', "")
166→                                            .plus(expectedIndent),
167→                                    )
168→                                }
169→                            }
170→                        }
171→                }
172→
173→            node
174→                .children()
175→                .last { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
176→                .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
177→                .nextCodeLeaf()
178→                ?.prevLeaf()
179→                ?.let { prevLeaf ->
180→                    // Let the indentation rule determine the exact indentation and only report and fix when the line needs to be wrapped
181→                    if (!prevLeaf.textContains('\n')) {
182→                        emit(prevLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline after last annotation", true)
183→                        if (autoCorrect) {
184→                            prevLeaf.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(expectedIndent)
185→                        }
186→                    }
187→                }
188→
189→            node
190→                .takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION }
191→                ?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
192→                ?.nextCodeLeaf()
193→                ?.prevLeaf()
194→                ?.let { leaf ->
195→                    // Let the indentation rule determine the exact indentation and only report and fix when the line needs to be wrapped
196→                    if (!leaf.textContains('\n')) {
197→                        emit(leaf.startOffset, "Expected newline", true)
198→                        if (autoCorrect) {
199→                            leaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(node.indent())
200→                        }
201→                    }
202→                }
203→        }
204→    }

206→    private fun ASTNode.shouldWrapAnnotations() =
207→        hasAnnotationWithParameter() ||
208→            hasMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLine() ||
209→            hasAnnotationBeforeConstructor()
210→
211→    private fun ASTNode.hasAnnotationWithParameter(): Boolean {
212→        require(elementType in ANNOTATION_CONTAINER)
213→        return children()
214→            .any {
215→                it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
216→                    it.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
217→                    it.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
218→                    it.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
219→            }
220→    }
221→
222→    private fun ASTNode.hasMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLine(): Boolean {
223→        require(elementType in ANNOTATION_CONTAINER)
224→        return children()
225→            .any {
226→                it.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
227→                    it.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
228→                    it.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
229→                    it.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
230→                    it.isLastAnnotationEntry()
231→                // Code below is disallowed
232→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
233→                // But following is allowed:
234→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
235→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
236→            }
237→    }
238→
239→    private fun ASTNode.hasAnnotationBeforeConstructor() =
240→        codeStyle == CodeStyleValue.ktlint_official &&
241→            hasAnnotationEntry() &&
242→            nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CONSTRUCTOR_KEYWORD
243→
244→    private fun ASTNode.hasAnnotationEntry() = children().any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
245→
246→    private fun visitTypeArgumentList(
247→        node: ASTNode,
248→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
249→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
250→    ) {
251→        node
252→            .children()
253→            .filter { it.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
254→            .mapNotNull { it.findChildByType(TYPE_REFERENCE) }
255→            .filter { it.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
256→            .mapNotNull { it.findChildByType(MODIFIER_LIST) }
257→            .filter { it.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
258→            .any { it.shouldWrapAnnotations() }
259→            .ifTrue { wrapTypeArgumentList(node, emit, autoCorrect) }
260→    }
261→
262→    private fun wrapTypeArgumentList(
263→        node: ASTNode,
264→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
265→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
266→    ) {
267→        val expectedIndent = node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)
268→
269→        node
270→            .children()
271→            .filter { it.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
272→            .forEach { typeProjection ->
273→                typeProjection
274→                    .prevLeaf()
275→                    ?.let { prevLeaf ->
276→                        if (prevLeaf.text != expectedIndent) {
277→                            emit(prevLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline", true)
278→                            if (autoCorrect) {
279→                                prevLeaf.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(expectedIndent)
280→                            }
281→                        }
282→                    }
283→            }
284→
285→        node
286→            .findChildByType(GT)
287→            ?.let { gt ->
288→                if (gt.prevLeaf()?.text != expectedIndent) {
289→                    emit(gt.startOffset, "Expected newline", true)
290→                    if (autoCorrect) {
291→                        gt.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedIndent)
292→                    }
293→                }
294→            }
295→    }

297→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
298→        node: ASTNode,
299→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
300→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
301→    ) {
302→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
303→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
304→            // Code below is disallowed
305→            //   @Foo1
306→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
307→            //   fun foo() {}
308→            emit(
309→                node.startOffset,
310→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
311→                true,
312→            )
313→            if (autoCorrect) {
314→                node
315→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
316→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
317→            }
318→        }
319→    }
320→
321→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
322→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
323→        return siblings(forward = false)
324→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
325→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
326→    }
327→
328→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
329→
330→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
331→        psi
332→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
333→            ?.useSiteTarget
334→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
335→
336→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
337→
338→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
339→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
340→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
341→
342→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
343→        this ==
344→            treeParent
345→                .children()
346→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
347→
348→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryWithoutParametersOnTheSameLine() =
349→        siblings(forward = false)
350→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() && !it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() }
351→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY && !it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() }
352→
353→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
354→        siblings(forward = false)
355→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
356→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
357→
358→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
359→        siblings(forward = false)
360→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
361→
362→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
363→        siblings(forward = false)
364→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
365→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
366→
367→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
368→
369→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
370→        siblings(forward = true)
371→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
372→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }

374→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
375→        node: ASTNode,
376→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
377→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
378→    ) {
379→        node
380→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
381→            .nextCodeLeaf()
382→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
383→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
384→
385→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
386→                    emit(
387→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
388→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
389→                        true,
390→                    )
391→                    if (autoCorrect) {
392→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
393→                    }
394→                }
395→            }
396→    }

398→    private fun visitAnnotation(
399→        node: ASTNode,
400→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
401→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
402→    ) {
403→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
404→
405→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
406→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
407→        ) {
408→            emit(
409→                node.startOffset,
410→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
411→                true,
412→            )
413→            if (autoCorrect) {
414→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
415→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
416→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
417→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
418→                }
419→            }
420→        }
421→    }
422→
423→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
424→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations =
425→            modifierListRoot
426→                .treeParent
427→                .treePrev
428→        // Make sure we only insert a single newline
429→        val indentWithoutNewline =
430→            nodeBeforeAnnotations
431→                ?.text
432→                .orEmpty()
433→                .substringAfterLast('\n')
434→        return "\n".plus(indentWithoutNewline)
435→    }
436→
437→    private companion object {
438→        val ANNOTATION_CONTAINER =
439→            listOf(
440→                ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
441→                FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST,
442→                MODIFIER_LIST,
443→            )
444→    }
445→}
446→
447→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId

520→    private fun fixFunctionBodyExpression(
521→        node: ASTNode,
522→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
523→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
524→        maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression: Int,
525→    ) {
526→        val lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression =
527→            node
528→                .findChildByType(EQ)
529→                ?.nextLeaf(includeEmpty = true)
530→                ?: return
531→        val bodyNodes = node.getFunctionBody(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression)
532→        val whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression = bodyNodes.getStartingWhitespaceOrNull()
533→        val functionBodyExpressionNodes = bodyNodes.dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
534→
535→        val functionBodyExpressionLines =
536→            functionBodyExpressionNodes
537→                .joinTextToString()
538→                .split("\n")
539→        functionBodyExpressionLines
540→            .firstOrNull()
541→            ?.also { firstLineOfBodyExpression ->
542→                if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
543→                    val mergeWithFunctionSignature =
544→                        if (firstLineOfBodyExpression.length < maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression) {
545→                            functionBodyExpressionWrapping == default ||
546→                                (functionBodyExpressionWrapping == multiline && functionBodyExpressionLines.size == 1) ||
547→                                node.isMultilineFunctionSignatureWithoutExplicitReturnType(
548→                                    lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression,
549→                                )
550→                        } else {
551→                            false
552→                        }
553→                    if (mergeWithFunctionSignature) {
554→                        emit(
555→                            whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression!!.startOffset,
556→                            "First line of body expression fits on same line as function signature",
557→                            true,
558→                        )
559→                        if (autoCorrect) {
560→                            (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
561→                        }
562→                    }
563→                } else if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression == null ||
564→                    !whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression.textContains('\n')
565→                ) {
566→                    if (node.isMultilineFunctionSignatureWithoutExplicitReturnType(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression) &&
567→                        firstLineOfBodyExpression.length + 1 <= maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression
568→                    ) {
569→                        if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression == null ||
570→                            whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression.text != " "
571→                        ) {
572→                            emit(
573→                                functionBodyExpressionNodes.first().startOffset,
574→                                "Single whitespace expected before expression body",
575→                                true,
576→                            )
577→                            if (autoCorrect) {
578→                                functionBodyExpressionNodes
579→                                    .first()
580→                                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
581→                            }
582→                        }
583→                    } else if (firstLineOfBodyExpression.length + 1 > maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression ||
584→                        (functionBodyExpressionWrapping == multiline && functionBodyExpressionLines.size > 1) ||
585→                        functionBodyExpressionWrapping == always
586→                    ) {
587→                        emit(
588→                            functionBodyExpressionNodes.first().startOffset,
589→                            "Newline expected before expression body",
590→                            true,
591→                        )
592→                        if (autoCorrect) {
593→                            functionBodyExpressionNodes
594→                                .first()
595→                                .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent))
596→                        }
597→                    }
598→                }
599→            }

 52→public class FunctionSignatureRule :
 53→    StandardRule(
 54→        id = "function-signature",
 55→        visitorModifiers =
 56→            setOf(
 57→                // Run after wrapping and spacing rules
 58→                VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 59→            ),
 60→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 61→            setOf(
 62→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 63→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 64→                MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY,
 65→                FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY,
 66→                FUNCTION_BODY_EXPRESSION_WRAPPING_PROPERTY,
 67→            ),
 68→    ),
 69→    Rule.Experimental {
 70→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 71→    private var indentConfig = DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 72→    private var maxLineLength = MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 73→    private var functionSignatureWrappingMinimumParameters =
 74→        FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 75→    private var functionBodyExpressionWrapping = FUNCTION_BODY_EXPRESSION_WRAPPING_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 76→
 77→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 78→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 79→        functionSignatureWrappingMinimumParameters = editorConfig[FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY]
 80→        functionBodyExpressionWrapping = editorConfig[FUNCTION_BODY_EXPRESSION_WRAPPING_PROPERTY]
 81→        indentConfig =
 82→            IndentConfig(
 83→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 84→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 85→            )
 86→        maxLineLength = editorConfig[MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY]
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 90→        node: ASTNode,
 91→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 92→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 93→    ) {
 94→        if (node.elementType == FUN) {
 95→            node
 96→                .functionSignatureNodes()
 97→                .any { it.elementType == EOL_COMMENT || it.elementType == BLOCK_COMMENT }
 98→                .ifTrue {
 99→                    // Rewriting function signatures in a consistent manner is hard or sometimes even impossible. For
100→                    // example a multiline signature which could fit on one line can not be rewritten in case it
101→                    // contains an EOL comment. Rewriting a single line signature which exceeds the max line length to a
102→                    // multiline signature is hard when it contains block comments. For now, it does not seem worth the
103→                    // effort to attempt it.
104→                    return
105→                }
106→
107→            visitFunctionSignature(node, emit, autoCorrect)
108→        }
109→    }
110→
111→    private fun ASTNode.functionSignatureNodes(): List<ASTNode> {
112→        // Find the signature including the element that has to be placed on the same line as the function signature
113→        //     fun foo(bar: String) {
114→        // or
115→        //     fun foo(bar: String) =
116→        val firstCodeChild = getFirstCodeChild()
117→        val startOfBodyBlock =
118→            this
119→                .findChildByType(BLOCK)
120→                ?.firstChildNode
121→        val startOfBodyExpression = this.findChildByType(EQ)
122→        return collectLeavesRecursively()
123→            .childrenBetween(
124→                startASTNodePredicate = { it == firstCodeChild },
125→                endASTNodePredicate = { it == startOfBodyBlock || it == startOfBodyExpression },
126→            )
127→    }
128→
129→    private fun ASTNode.getFirstCodeChild(): ASTNode? {
130→        val funNode =
131→            if (elementType == FUN_KEYWORD) {
132→                this.treeParent
133→            } else {
134→                this
135→            }
136→        funNode
137→            ?.findChildByType(MODIFIER_LIST)
138→            ?.let { modifierList ->
139→                val iterator = modifierList.children().iterator()
140→                var currentNode: ASTNode
141→                while (iterator.hasNext()) {
142→                    currentNode = iterator.next()
143→                    if (currentNode.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
144→                        currentNode.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY &&
145→                        currentNode.elementType != WHITE_SPACE
146→                    ) {
147→                        return currentNode
148→                    }
149→                }
150→                return modifierList.nextCodeSibling()
151→            }
152→        return funNode.nextCodeLeaf()
153→    }
154→
155→    private fun visitFunctionSignature(
156→        node: ASTNode,
157→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
158→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
159→    ) {
160→        require(node.elementType == FUN)
161→
162→        val forceMultilineSignature =
163→            node.hasMinimumNumberOfParameters() ||
164→                node.containsMultilineParameter() ||
165→                (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.containsAnnotatedParameter())
166→        if (isMaxLineLengthSet()) {
167→            val singleLineFunctionSignatureLength = calculateFunctionSignatureLengthAsSingleLineSignature(node, emit, autoCorrect)
168→            // Function signatures not having parameters, should not be reformatted automatically. It would result in function signatures
169→            // like below, which are not acceptable:
170→            //     fun aVeryLongFunctionName(
171→            //     ) = "some-value"
172→            //
173→            //     fun aVeryLongFunctionName(
174→            //     ): SomeVeryLongTypeName =
175→            //         SomeVeryLongTypeName(...)
176→            // Leave it up to the max-line-length rule to detect those violations so that the developer can handle it manually.
177→            val rewriteFunctionSignatureWithParameters = node.countParameters() > 0 && singleLineFunctionSignatureLength > maxLineLength
178→            if (forceMultilineSignature || rewriteFunctionSignatureWithParameters) {
179→                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = true, dryRun = false)
180→                // Due to rewriting the function signature, the remaining length on the last line of the multiline
181→                // signature needs to be recalculated
182→                val lengthOfLastLine = recalculateRemainLengthForFirstLineOfBodyExpression(node)
183→                fixFunctionBody(node, emit, autoCorrect, maxLineLength - lengthOfLastLine)
184→            } else {
185→                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = false)
186→                fixFunctionBody(node, emit, autoCorrect, maxLineLength - singleLineFunctionSignatureLength)
187→            }
188→        } else {
189→            // When max line length is not set then keep it as single line function signature only when the original
190→            // signature already was a single line signature. Otherwise, rewrite the entire signature as a multiline
191→            // signature.
192→            val rewriteToSingleLineFunctionSignature =
193→                node
194→                    .functionSignatureNodes()
195→                    .none { it.textContains('\n') }
196→            if (!forceMultilineSignature && rewriteToSingleLineFunctionSignature) {
197→                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = false)
198→            } else {
199→                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = true, dryRun = false)
200→            }
201→        }
202→    }
203→
204→    private fun recalculateRemainLengthForFirstLineOfBodyExpression(node: ASTNode): Int {
205→        val closingParenthesis =
206→            node
207→                .findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
208→                ?.findChildByType(RPAR)
209→        val tailNodesOfFunctionSignature =
210→            node
211→                .functionSignatureNodes()
212→                .childrenBetween(
213→                    startASTNodePredicate = { it == closingParenthesis },
214→                    endASTNodePredicate = { false },
215→                )
216→
217→        return node.indent(false).length +
218→            tailNodesOfFunctionSignature.sumOf { it.text.length }
219→    }
220→
221→    private fun ASTNode.containsMultilineParameter(): Boolean =
222→        findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
223→            ?.children()
224→            .orEmpty()
225→            .filter { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
226→            .any { it.textContains('\n') }
227→
228→    private fun ASTNode.containsAnnotatedParameter(): Boolean =
229→        findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
230→            ?.children()
231→            .orEmpty()
232→            .filter { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
233→            .any { it.isAnnotated() }
234→
235→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotated() =
236→        findChildByType(MODIFIER_LIST)
237→            ?.children()
238→            .orEmpty()
239→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
240→
241→    private fun calculateFunctionSignatureLengthAsSingleLineSignature(
242→        node: ASTNode,
243→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
244→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
245→    ): Int {
246→        val actualFunctionSignatureLength = node.getFunctionSignatureLength()
247→
248→        // Calculate the length of the function signature in case it would be rewritten as single line (and without a
249→        // maximum line length). The white space correction will be calculated via a dry run of the actual fix.
250→        return actualFunctionSignatureLength +
251→            // Calculate the white space correction in case the signature would be rewritten to a single line
252→            fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = true)
253→    }
254→
255→    private fun ASTNode.getFunctionSignatureLength() = indent(false).length + getFunctionSignatureNodesLength()
256→
257→    private fun ASTNode.getFunctionSignatureNodesLength() =
258→        functionSignatureNodes()
259→            .joinTextToString()
260→            .length
261→
262→    private fun fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(
263→        node: ASTNode,
264→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
265→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
266→        multiline: Boolean,
267→        dryRun: Boolean,
268→    ): Int {
269→        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
270→
271→        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
272→        val firstParameterInList =
273→            valueParameterList
274→                .children()
275→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
276→
277→        whiteSpaceCorrection +=
278→            if (firstParameterInList == null) {
279→                // handle empty parameter list
280→                fixWhiteSpacesInEmptyValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, dryRun)
281→            } else {
282→                fixWhiteSpacesBeforeFirstParameterInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun) +
283→                    fixWhiteSpacesBetweenParametersInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun) +
284→                    fixWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun)
285→            }
286→
287→        return whiteSpaceCorrection
288→    }
289→
290→    private fun fixWhiteSpacesInEmptyValueParameterList(
291→        node: ASTNode,
292→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
293→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
294→        dryRun: Boolean,
295→    ): Int {
296→        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
297→
298→        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
299→
300→        valueParameterList
301→            .children()
302→            .filter { it.elementType != LPAR && it.elementType != RPAR }
303→            .also { elementsInValueParameterList ->
304→                // Functions with comments in the value parameter list are excluded from processing before. So an "empty" value
305→                // parameter list should only contain a single whitespace element
306→                require(elementsInValueParameterList.count() <= 1)
307→            }
308→            .firstOrNull()
309→            ?.let { whiteSpace ->
310→                if (!dryRun) {
311→                    emit(
312→                        whiteSpace.startOffset,
313→                        "No whitespace expected in empty parameter list",
314→                        true,
315→                    )
316→                }
317→                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
318→                    whiteSpace.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpace)
319→                } else {
320→                    whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpace.textLength
321→                }
322→            }
323→
324→        return whiteSpaceCorrection
325→    }

327→    private fun fixWhiteSpacesBeforeFirstParameterInValueParameterList(
328→        node: ASTNode,
329→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
330→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
331→        multiline: Boolean,
332→        dryRun: Boolean,
333→    ): Int {
334→        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
335→
336→        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
337→        val firstParameterInList =
338→            valueParameterList
339→                .children()
340→                .first { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
341→
342→        val firstParameter = firstParameterInList.firstChildNode
343→        firstParameter
344→            ?.prevLeaf()
345→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
346→            .let { whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier ->
347→                if (multiline) {
348→                    val expectedParameterIndent = node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)
349→                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
350→                        whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != expectedParameterIndent
351→                    ) {
352→                        if (!dryRun) {
353→                            emit(
354→                                firstParameterInList.startOffset,
355→                                "Newline expected after opening parenthesis",
356→                                true,
357→                            )
358→                        }
359→                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
360→                            valueParameterList.firstChildNode.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(expectedParameterIndent)
361→                        } else {
362→                            whiteSpaceCorrection += expectedParameterIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
363→                        }
364→                    }
365→                } else {
366→                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier != null) {
367→                        if (!dryRun) {
368→                            emit(
369→                                firstParameter!!.startOffset,
370→                                "No whitespace expected between opening parenthesis and first parameter name",
371→                                true,
372→                            )
373→                        }
374→                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
375→                            whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier)
376→                        } else {
377→                            whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.textLength
378→                        }
379→                    }
380→                }
381→            }
382→
383→        return whiteSpaceCorrection
384→    }

386→    private fun fixWhiteSpacesBetweenParametersInValueParameterList(
387→        node: ASTNode,
388→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
389→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
390→        multiline: Boolean,
391→        dryRun: Boolean,
392→    ): Int {
393→        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
394→
395→        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
396→        val firstParameterInList =
397→            valueParameterList
398→                .children()
399→                .first { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
400→
401→        valueParameterList
402→            .children()
403→            .filter { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
404→            .filter { it != firstParameterInList }
405→            .forEach { valueParameter ->
406→                val firstChildNodeInValueParameter = valueParameter.firstChildNode
407→                firstChildNodeInValueParameter
408→                    ?.prevLeaf()
409→                    ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
410→                    .let { whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier ->
411→                        if (multiline) {
412→                            val expectedParameterIndent = node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)
413→                            if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
414→                                whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != expectedParameterIndent
415→                            ) {
416→                                if (!dryRun) {
417→                                    emit(
418→                                        valueParameter.startOffset,
419→                                        "Parameter should start on a newline",
420→                                        true,
421→                                    )
422→                                }
423→                                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
424→                                    firstChildNodeInValueParameter.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedParameterIndent)
425→                                } else {
426→                                    whiteSpaceCorrection += expectedParameterIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
427→                                }
428→                            }
429→                        } else {
430→                            if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null || whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != " ") {
431→                                if (!dryRun) {
432→                                    emit(
433→                                        firstChildNodeInValueParameter!!.startOffset,
434→                                        "Single whitespace expected before parameter",
435→                                        true,
436→                                    )
437→                                }
438→                                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
439→                                    firstChildNodeInValueParameter.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
440→                                } else {
441→                                    whiteSpaceCorrection += 1 - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
442→                                }
443→                            }
444→                        }
445→                    }
446→            }
447→
448→        return whiteSpaceCorrection
449→    }

451→    private fun fixWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis(
452→        node: ASTNode,
453→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
454→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
455→        multiline: Boolean,
456→        dryRun: Boolean,
457→    ): Int {
458→        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
459→
460→        val newlineAndIndent = node.indent()
461→        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
462→
463→        val closingParenthesis = valueParameterList.findChildByType(RPAR)
464→        closingParenthesis
465→            ?.prevSibling()
466→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
467→            .let { whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis ->
468→                if (multiline) {
469→                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis == null ||
470→                        whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.text != newlineAndIndent
471→                    ) {
472→                        if (!dryRun) {
473→                            emit(
474→                                closingParenthesis!!.startOffset,
475→                                "Newline expected before closing parenthesis",
476→                                true,
477→                            )
478→                        }
479→                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
480→                            closingParenthesis!!.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(newlineAndIndent)
481→                        } else {
482→                            whiteSpaceCorrection += newlineAndIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis?.textLength ?: 0)
483→                        }
484→                    }
485→                } else {
486→                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis != null &&
487→                        whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.nextLeaf()?.elementType == RPAR
488→                    ) {
489→                        if (!dryRun) {
490→                            emit(
491→                                whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.startOffset,
492→                                "No whitespace expected between last parameter and closing parenthesis",
493→                                true,
494→                            )
495→                        }
496→                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
497→                            whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis)
498→                        } else {
499→                            whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.textLength
500→                        }
501→                    }
502→                }
503→            }
504→        return whiteSpaceCorrection
505→    }

507→    private fun fixFunctionBody(
508→        node: ASTNode,
509→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
510→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
511→        maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression: Int,
512→    ) {
513→        if (node.findChildByType(EQ) == null) {
514→            fixFunctionBodyBlock(node, emit, autoCorrect)
515→        } else {
516→            fixFunctionBodyExpression(node, emit, autoCorrect, maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression)
517→        }
518→    }
